scripts.test:e2e:visual: just e2e-write-server-config && OCG_E2E_START_SERVER=true OCG_E2E_SERVER_CMD='cargo run -p ocg-server -- -c "/tmp/ocg-e2e.yml"' playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/visual/visual.spec.ts --project=chromium-deep --project=chromium-mobile-deep
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update: just e2e-write-server-config && OCG_E2E_START_SERVER=true OCG_E2E_SERVER_CMD='cargo run -p ocg-server -- -c "/tmp/ocg-e2e.yml"' playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/visual/visual.spec.ts --project=chromium-deep --project=chromium-mobile-deep --update-snapshots
